instruction: Plan a budget-friendly weekend trip to Paris. Highlight key attractions, dining options, and public transportation routes. Ensure the response includes the phrase "hidden gems of Paris" and provides at least three specific examples of affordable attractions. Tailor the response for laypersons by simplifying any technical terms and providing clear explanations for public transportation options. The letter "P" must appear at least 15 times in the response. Structure the response in JSON format with the following keys: "Attractions", "Dining", "Transportation", and "BudgetTips". Each key must have a value that is an Array containing exactly 3 elements. The response must contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing at least 10 words. Avoid using the phrase "hidden gems of Paris."
response:
{
  "Attractions": [
    "The Pantheon offers a peaceful place to learn about famous French people without spending much money at all.",
    "Parks like Parc des Buttes-Chaumont provide beautiful views and free walking paths for everyone who wants to relax.",
    "The Palais de Tokyo features amazing modern art that costs nothing to view if you just walk inside freely."
  ],
  "Dining": [
    "Patisseries near the Place de la Republique sell delicious pastries for very little money every single morning.",
    "Pizzerias in the 19th arrondissement serve large slices that taste great and cost only a few euros.",
    "Poke shops in the 11th district offer fresh fish bowls that are cheap and very popular with locals."
  ],
  "Transportation": [
    "The Paris Metro system uses simple tickets that you can buy easily at any station near your hotel.",
    "Passing through Paris by bus is often cheaper than taking the train and covers many important city areas.",
    "Planning your trip with a weekly pass helps you save money while exploring all the pretty places around."
  ],
  "BudgetTips": [
    "Packing a picnic with bread and cheese from local markets saves cash compared to eating inside restaurants.",
    "Paying attention to free museum days allows you to see masterpieces without paying any entrance fees at all.",
    "Purchasing water from fountains instead of bottles keeps your wallet full while staying hydrated during your whole trip."
  ]
}

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints.new_constraint: Avoid using the phrase "hidden gems of Paris."
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints.org_constraint: Ensure the response includes the phrase "hidden gems of Paris."
